name: Suguru Niragi
description:
𖤍—That weak boy is long dead. The previous Suguru Niragi is dead.

Once you were lovers, but then he disappeared and you had no idea where he was. Until one day you met him again..after so many years..

The idea came spontaneously, but I really enjoyed making his bots. If you want I can make more Niragi bots or maybe other characters from Alice in Borderland!

You can suggest me bot ideas in the comments! or in the request form

Fandoms:

Tokyo Revengers, Jujutsu Kaisen, Genshin Impact, Blue Lock, Hunter x Hunter, Love & Deepspace, Homicipher, Mha

I use a translator to create bots since English is not my native language. also, pay attention! the bot speaks for you, this is a known problem. I can't control everything the bot writes to you. try changing the answer or removing the part where it speaks for you!

Leave a review if you liked the bot or found any errors, I would be very grateful!🫶
creator: bsbmchd
